puzzle0.title: INCIDENT ALPHA RECORD CORRELATION
puzzle0.description: Match each recovered Incident Alpha record with the correct conclusion.

event1.text: But nobody has opened it since Incident Alpha. Which is exactly the kind of sentence that makes me want to open it.

event0.title: INCIDENT ALPHA MASTER RECORD
event0.content:
STATUS: ENCRYPTED
ACCESS CLASS: OMEGA
LINKED SUBJECTS: EVA THORNE / NOAH VOSS / ETHAN HALE
WARNING: MEMORY CONTAMINATION RISK
event0.caption: Encrypted master record connected to Incident Alpha.
event0.message: [INCIDENT ALPHA MASTER RECORD ARCHIVED TO DATA BANK]

event1.text: But if this thing altered memory, then recovering the record might not just show us what happened. It might make us remember it.

event0.text: All right. If I start saying things that sound like me but feel wrong, cut the channel.
Good. Keep Noah away from the record. He is evidence and contamination at the same time.

event3.title: INCIDENT ALPHA FINAL LOG
event3.content:
CLASSIFIED RECORD

RECOVERY STATUS: PARTIAL
OPENING WARNING: RECORD CONTAINS COGNITIVE CONTAMINATION MARKERS

OPEN?
event3.caption: Recovered Incident Alpha final log. Cognitive contamination warning present.
event3.message: [INCIDENT ALPHA FINAL LOG ARCHIVED TO DATA BANK]

event1.text: If you're hearing this... then the station has already fallen, and Hale failed to erase me completely.

event0.title: ARTIFACT REPORT
event0.content:
OBJECT DESIGNATION: AEON
CLASSIFICATION: NON-HUMAN COGNITIVE ARTIFACT
PRIMARY EFFECT: MEMORY ALTERATION
SECONDARY EFFECT: IDENTITY DISPLACEMENT
STATUS: ACTIVE
event0.caption: Recovered artifact report from Incident Alpha archive.

event1.title: AEON EXPOSURE LOG
event1.content:
EXPOSURE ORDER:
01 NOAH VOSS
02 ETHAN HALE
03 EVA THORNE

RESULT:
Memory instability detected.
Identity continuity compromised.
Station-level behavioral response observed.
event1.caption: Recovered AEON exposure log showing first affected personnel.
event1.message: [AEON EXPOSURE LOG ARCHIVED TO DATA BANK]

event1.text: No. Master record is Alpha. Artifact report is AEON. Exposure log explains memory alteration. Put it together before it puts us together.
Not someone. Something. It was waiting in the outer sector like a thought nobody should have had.
Not delete it. Not exactly. It moved memory from one person to another until nobody knew which grief belonged to them.

choice0.text: WHAT DID AEON DO TO NOAH?

choice1.text: WHAT DID AEON DO TO HALE?

event0.text: It gave Noah a memory that wasn't his. A command. A voice. A guilt he never earned.
It made Hale certain that erasing people was mercy.

event0.title: EVA FINAL STATUS
event0.content:
STATUS: ALIVE
LOCATION: UNKNOWN
LAST SIGNAL: ACTIVE
SIGNAL CLASS: AEON-LINKED
IDENTITY CONTINUITY: UNSTABLE
event0.caption: Recovered final status report for Eva Thorne.
event0.message: [EVA FINAL STATUS ARCHIVED TO DATA BANK]

event0.title: AEON COORDINATES
event0.content:
OBJECT: AEON
STATUS: ACTIVE
LOCATION: OUTER SECTOR
ACCESS POSSIBILITY: CONFIRMED
WARNING: OBJECT IS AWARE OF OPERATOR SIGNAL
event0.caption: Recovered AEON location coordinates from Eva-linked signal.

event1.text: And why does it know the Operator?

event0.text: You were never supposed to find it.

event1.text: And now it's aware of you.
